response:
the product review conveys a positive sentiment. the reviewer is enthusiastic about the book and praises its content and characters. they mention that they enjoyed the book so much that they would want to read it again when they are older. the reviewer also highlights the characters as being enthralling and the book as an embodiment of all great reads. they use five stars to indicate their satisfaction and suggest that the story may be different from what they expected. the review is positive and shows appreciation for the book.

the reviewer does not express any negative sentiments. they do not mention any issues or drawbacks with the book. they only mention that they have not read the entire book and that they thought they were getting the story of the deer. they do not criticize the book or express any dissatisfaction. the review is positive and shows that the reviewer is satisfied with the book.
